trials.analysis: The experiment `bow_advanced_20260421_165702_run_01` successfully executed with an F1 score of 0.7632 and accuracy of 0.8037, indicating that the model performed reasonably well on the validation set. The use of advanced Bag-of-Words (BoW) techniques, including character n-grams up to length 6 and word n-grams up to length 3, likely contributed to the improved performance compared to simpler models. However, there is room for improvement as the F1 score could be higher, suggesting that more sophisticated feature engineering or model tuning might enhance results. For the next run, consider experimenting with different regularization strengths (`logreg_c`), adjusting the minimum document frequency (`min_df`), or incorporating additional features such as TF-IDF to see if these changes can boost the model's performance further.
